description: Files that MUST appear in impact analysis answers for common change types

_EXAMPLE_add_endpoint.description: REPLACE: describe a common change type for this repo
contractually_required_files: REPLACE: exact file paths that ALWAYS change for this type (e.g., src/routes/index.ts)
required_file_families: REPLACE: glob patterns using * wildcards (e.g., src/routes/*.ts, tests/routes/test_*.ts)

_rules.contractually_required_files: Exact paths only. Every path must exist on disk.
_rules.required_file_families: Shell glob patterns using * wildcards. Every pattern must match >= 1 real file. Template variables like {name} or {domain} are NOT allowed — use * instead.
_rules.validation: After filling, run each glob and verify it matches real files. Remove any _EXAMPLE entries.
